focus: Code quality, security, UX polish, testing, performance. New features and improvements ARE allowed if they match Stakr's direction (gamified self-improvement, social challenges, commitment contracts).

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript null safety errors
tasks.description: Fix 8 'session is possibly null' errors across the codebase. Add proper null checks/guards before accessing session properties. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS18047

tasks.title: Fix missing 'toast' references
tasks.description: 7 files reference 'toast' without importing it. Either import from the toast hook or add the missing useToast() calls. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS2304.*toast

tasks.title: Fix implicit any parameters
tasks.description: ~30 parameters have implicit 'any' types (user, p, w, sum, item, challenge etc). Add explicit types. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep TS7006

tasks.title: Fix Challenge type mismatches
tasks.description: Properties 'duration', 'difficulty' missing from Challenge type but used in code. Update the Challenge interface or fix the property access. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'Challenge'

tasks.title: Fix ChallengeStats union type narrowing
tasks.description: Properties like total_distributed, reward_distribution, completed_participants, platform_revenue accessed on union types without narrowing. Add type guards. Run: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'ChallengeStats\|XPChallengeStats\|RewardDistribution'

tasks.title: Add error.tsx boundaries to all route groups
tasks.description: Zero error.tsx files found. Add error boundaries to at least: app/dashboard, app/challenge, app/profile, app/discover, app/create-challenge, app/my-challenges, app/settings, app/admin

tasks.title: Reduce 'as any' assertions — top offenders
tasks.description: 907 'as any' assertions in the codebase. Start with lib/ and app/api/ directories — replace with proper types. Target: reduce by 50% in lib/ and app/api/. Run: grep -rn 'as any' lib/ app/api/ | wc -l

tasks.title: Clean up console.log statements in production code
tasks.description: 688 console.log/error calls in lib/ and app/api/. Remove debug logs, keep intentional error logging. Run: grep -rn 'console.log' lib/ app/api/ | head -30

tasks.title: Fix catch(error: any) patterns
tasks.description: 42 catch blocks use 'any' type. Replace with 'unknown' and add proper error narrowing. Run: grep -rn 'catch (.*: any)' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx'

tasks.title: Audit dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage
tasks.description: Found in components/ui/chart.tsx and app/layout.tsx. Verify XSS safety — ensure content is sanitised or from trusted sources only. Add DOMPurify if needed.

tasks.title: Add loading.tsx to key pages
tasks.description: Only 4 loading.tsx files for 30+ pages. Add loading states to: dashboard, discover, challenge/[id], profile, my-challenges, my-active, notifications, settings, admin

tasks.title: API route input validation — add Zod schemas
tasks.description: Check app/api/ routes for missing input validation. Add Zod schemas to at least: auth/register, challenges/[id]/join, payments/checkout, user/profile, upload/presigned-url, social/follow

tasks.title: Fix broken Jest test suite (23 failed suites)
tasks.description: Jest worker is crashing with 'encountered 4 child process exceptions'. Investigate root cause (likely memory/timeout issues or broken imports). Check jest.config.js settings, increase workers/timeout, fix broken test imports. Critical: 23 test suites failing.

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript redeclaration errors in notification utils
tasks.description: Multiple 'Cannot redeclare exported variable' errors for notifyWelcome, notifyStreakMilestone, notifyRewardsMilestone, notifyRefundProcessed, notifyProofSubmitted, notifyProofReminder, notifyProofRejected, notifyProofApproved. These functions are exported multiple times. Consolidate exports.

tasks.title: Fix PanelResizeHandle import issues
tasks.description: 3 instances of 'Property PanelResizeHandle does not exist on type react-resizable-panels'. Update import statements or package version. Check components using Panel/PanelGroup/PanelResizeHandle.

tasks.title: Fix route param type constraints (TS2344)
tasks.description: 3 route files have type constraint errors with ParamCheck<RouteContext>. Likely Next.js 15 route param type changes. Update route signatures to match new Next.js patterns. Check app/api routes with [id] params.

tasks.title: Fix ESLint errors: unescaped entities and image optimization
tasks.description: 5 ESLint errors (unescaped apostrophes/quotes in JSX) in report-content-modal, friend-activity, social-proof, verification-trigger. Also replace 3 tags with Next.js in trending-challenges, user-posts, verification-modal for performance.

tasks.title: Fix useEffect dependency warnings
tasks.description: Missing dependencies in useEffect hooks: leaderboard (fetchLeaderboardData), social-feed (feedData, fetchFeedFromApi, page), verification-modal (capturePhotoFromStream, startVideoRecording). Add deps or refactor to avoid stale closures.

tasks.title: Remove innerHTML security risk in integration-icon.tsx
tasks.description: Line 91 uses target.parentElement.innerHTML with fallback emojis. Replace with textContent or React state update. Current implementation has XSS risk if provider names aren't sanitized.

tasks.title: Implement real notification loading
tasks.description: notification-provider.tsx has TODO: 'Load real notifications from /api/user/notifications'. Currently returns empty array. Build endpoint, fetch notifications on mount, implement polling/SSE for real-time updates.

tasks.title: Implement Stripe withdrawal/payout integration
tasks.description: app/api/payments/withdraw/route.ts has TODO: 'Integrate with Stripe Connect or banking API for actual payout'. Currently mocked. Research Stripe Connect setup, implement real withdrawal flow with proper status tracking.

tasks.title: Implement real database queries for creators and brands
tasks.description: app/api/creators/route.ts and app/api/brands/route.ts return hardcoded mock data (TODO). Create proper DB schemas if needed, query real data, add pagination/filtering.

tasks.title: Implement leaderboard rank tracking
tasks.description: social/leaderboard/route.ts has 2 TODOs: 'Implement rank tracking' for previousRank. Add rank history table, track daily/weekly rank changes, enable up/down arrows in UI.

tasks.title: Improve accessibility: add ARIA labels to interactive components
tasks.description: Only 25 aria-* attributes found across 174 components (14% coverage). Audit key components: buttons, modals, forms, navigation. Add aria-label, aria-describedby, role attributes. Focus on challenge cards, verification modal, settings.

tasks.title: Add API route rate limiting
tasks.description: No rate limiting detected on API routes. Implement rate limiting middleware using upstash/ratelimit or similar. Protect: auth/register, payments/checkout, ai/validate-proof, social/follow. Prevent abuse and API spam.

tasks.title: Add E2E test file upload implementation
tasks.description: tests/e2e/pages/challenge.page.ts line 120 TODO: 'Implement file upload for E2E tests'. Required for testing proof submission flow end-to-end. Use Playwright's setInputFiles() method.

tasks.title: Fix Challenge type missing properties
tasks.description: Type errors: Challenge objects missing hostContribution, entryFeePercentage, failedStakeCut, status. Update Challenge interface in lib/db/schema or fix data creation in components/trending-challenges and similar.

tasks.title: Fix failing test suite - 7 test suites failing
tasks.description: Critical: 7 test suites failed, 55 tests failing. Main issues appear to be in challenge-grid, thumbnail-system, and other core components. Investigate timeout errors, waitFor() failures, and component rendering issues. Check test/__tests__/ directory for specifics. Priority: get test suite green before other work.

tasks.title: Fix TypeScript implicit 'any' index errors
tasks.description: Fix 3 TS7053 errors where expression of type 'symbol' or 'string' can't index type '{}'. These likely involve dynamic property access. Add proper type assertions or index signatures. Locations: check lib/ files for object indexing patterns.

tasks.title: Fix missing ChallengeAnalysis properties
tasks.description: Fix 2 TS2739 errors: ChallengeAnalysis type missing properties like stakesAppropriate, verificationOptimal, evidenceRequirements, designRecommendations, riskFactors. Either add these to the returned objects or update the type definition. Check AI validation routes.

tasks.title: Fix PanelGroup import from react-resizable-panels
tasks.description: Fix 2 TS2339 errors: 'PanelGroup' does not exist on react-resizable-panels. Either update import syntax or package version. Check components using Panel/PanelGroup/PanelResizeHandle - likely in admin or dashboard layouts.

tasks.title: Fix NotificationContextType missing isLoading property
tasks.description: Fix TS2339: Property 'isLoading' does not exist on type 'NotificationContextType'. Either add isLoading to the context type definition or remove usage. Check notification-provider.tsx and consumers.

tasks.title: Implement admin route TODOs: reward payout and notifications
tasks.description: app/api/admin/verifications/route.ts has 4 TODOs: (1) Process reward payout on approval (line 324), (2) Send notification to user about decision (line 325), (3) Process financial implications on reversal (line 438), (4) Send notification about reversal (line 439). Implement these to complete the admin verification workflow.

tasks.title: Implement admin appeals financial processing
tasks.description: app/api/admin/appeals/route.ts line 312 TODO: 'Process financial implications (refund stakes, recalculate rewards)'. Critical for proper appeal handling. Implement stake refund logic, reward recalculation, and transaction recording.

tasks.title: Remove hardcoded test-user-id in checkins route
tasks.description: app/api/challenges/[id]/checkins/route.ts line 97 uses hardcoded 'test-user-id' instead of session.user.id. Fix by using proper session auth. Verify auth is enabled for this route.

tasks.title: Implement challenge edit functionality
tasks.description: app/api/challenges/[id]/route.ts line 251 TODO: 'Implement full edit functionality when edit form is created'. Currently only partial implementation. Create edit form UI and complete backend logic for updating challenges (title, description, rules, stakes, etc). Consider constraints: can't edit active challenges significantly.

tasks.title: Re-enable image moderation with proper logic
tasks.description: app/api/moderate/image/route.ts line 68 TODO: 'Re-enable with more restrictive logic once moderation issues are resolved'. Currently disabled. Research what issues caused it to be disabled, implement fix, add tests, re-enable. Critical for content safety.

tasks.title: Improve accessibility: increase ARIA coverage from 14%
tasks.description: Only 53 aria-* attributes found across 173+ components (14% coverage). Target 50%+ coverage. Priority components: challenge cards, verification modal, settings forms, navigation, social feed, leaderboard. Add aria-label, aria-describedby, role, aria-live for dynamic content.

tasks.title: Fix ESLint errors: escape entities in JSX
tasks.description: Multiple react/no-unescaped-entities errors: unescaped apostrophes and quotes in random-checkin-modal, pwa-install-prompt, report-content-modal, friend-activity, social-proof, verification-trigger. Replace ' with ' or {"'"}, " with " or {"\""}.

tasks.title: Add API route rate limiting for abuse prevention
tasks.description: No rate limiting detected on API routes. Implement middleware using @upstash/ratelimit or similar. Priority routes: auth/register (prevent spam accounts), payments/checkout (prevent abuse), ai/validate-proof (expensive AI calls), social/follow (prevent spam), report/route (prevent spam reports). Use sliding window, different limits per endpoint.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive input validation with Zod to API routes
tasks.description: Audit all 20 API routes for input validation. Priority routes missing validation: payments/checkout (amount, items), social/follow (userId), report/route (contentType, reason), posts/route (content), upload/confirm. Create Zod schemas, validate request bodies, return 400 with clear errors on invalid input.

tasks.title: Performance: implement lazy loading for heavy components
tasks.description: Identify and lazy-load heavy components to reduce initial bundle size. Candidates: admin panels, verification modal (with camera), chart components, social feed (infinite scroll), challenge creation wizard. Use next/dynamic with loading states. Target: reduce initial JS by 20%+.
